message: Node started: Extract the band gap (3 eV) and the 1s exciton peak energy (1 eV). Use these to determine the exciton binding energy (E_b = Band Gap - Peak Energy). From the binding energy of the 1s state, calculate the effective Rydberg constant (R_eff) using the formula E_b = R_eff / n^2 where n=1.
